reproduction: Compile family_birdhouse at source commit 0bb67a5 and inspect every resolved butt_screwed and cleat_screwed install contract: all ordinary fixed-joint screws declare head=proud, and the manual prints that token as the required finish.
root_cause: straight_screw_group used proud as an indiscriminate default even though ordinary fixed screws need bearing engagement; only the pivot and removable latch mechanisms require clearance under a proud head.
